case_title: RODRIGO TAVORA DE OLIVEIRA VS. MARISOL KIM

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-30-2018 - JUDGMENT.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-30-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-30-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF RODRIGO TAVORA DE OLIVERIA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARISOL KIM IS PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICES IS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT WAIVES SERVICE TO PROCEED TODAY. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,500.00 FILED BY DE OLIVEIRA, RODRIGO TAVORA AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, MARISOL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-30-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FOR FEE: $0.00 SERVED NOV-09-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT KIM, MARISOL
(SC-108) REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIM) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DE OLIVEIRA, RODRIGO TAVORA
ORDER DENYING REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT (SC-108)
(SC-108) ANSWER TO REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER (SMALL CLAIM) RECEIVED AFTER ORDER. FILED BY DEFENDANT KIM, MARISOL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DE OLIVEIRA, RODRIGO TAVORA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT KIM, MARISOL $160.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $210.00, THE LEASE AGREEMENT OBLIGED DEFENDANT TO GIVE 30 DAYS NOTICE BEFORE TERMINATION BUT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR 3 MONTHS' LIQUIDATED DAMAGES IS UNREASONABLE AND NOT A FAIR MEASURE OF HIS ACTUAL DAMAGES. DEFENDANT OWED ONE MONTH'S RENT AT $640 (FOR EIGHT DAYS AT $80/DAY), OFFSET BY DEFENDANT'S $480 DEPOSIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
